class.name: description_simple_car/PwmWheelActuator
class.description: Controls a DC motor using PWM signals. Uses 1 command interface (effort) and 1 state interfaces (position). The example is the starting point to implement a hardware interface.

class.name: description_simple_car/PwmServoActuator
class.description: Controls a servo motor using PWM signals. Uses 1 command interface (position) and 1 state interface (position). The example is the starting point to implement a hardware interface for servo motors.
